Footer.tagline: The Precision Concierge Architecture for hospitality leaders.

Landing.heroTitle: Qrixa: Powerful Menu Ordering & Table Management
Landing.heroDescription: Seamlessly manage orders, tables, and branches across multiple currencies with our intuitive SaaS platform.
Landing.valueTitle: Designed for Growth. Built for Precision.
Landing.valueDescription: Everything you need to orchestrate a world-class dining experience.
Landing.multiBranchText: Centralize operations across cities with one clean dashboard.
Landing.tableOrderingText: Sync table-side orders with kitchen displays instantly.
Landing.multiCurrencyText: Process payments and reporting in local currencies automatically.
Landing.analyticsText: Understand peak hours, top items, and service performance.
Landing.kitchenTitle: The Precision Concierge for Your Kitchen.
Landing.quote: Qrixa transformed our workflow in the first week. We've seen a 22% increase in table turnover.

points.queueText: Automated load balancing between kitchen stations to prevent bottlenecks.
points.menuText: Update prices or disable items instantly across all digital platforms and physical QR menus.
points.staffText: Identify your top performers and optimize scheduling based on real-world order velocity.

Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to scale your restaurant business?
Landing.ctaDescription: Join high-performing restaurants using Qrixa to streamline operations.
